title: Tipp-Ex Shake'n Squeeze Correction Pens – 8 ml, Box of 10
features: Just shake and correct with this correction pen's soft squeezable barrel for accurate flow control
Fine metal tip designed to eliminate exactly what you don’t want
This top quality correction pen has unbeatable quick-drying action for instant rewrites
Clear dual-purpose cap protects the tip and then clips on to any notebook

Tipp-Ex was a legacy German brand specialised in correction supplies. Just shake, glide, correct. This box contains 10 high-tech correction pens engineered with a leak-proof valve. Rugged: nylon barrel withstands dropping and temperature changes. Flexible: squeezable grip zone is touch-sensitive for adjusting the flow to the size of the correction area. Accurate: fine metal tip designed to eliminate precisely what you don’t want. Safe: every Tipp-Ex Shake’n’Squeeze correction fluid pen undergoes over 30 quality inspections during the manufacturing process, from every part to the finished product. BIC quality at your service.
description: From the manufacturer The Tipp-Ex Shake'n Squeeze is a handy correction pen, making it simple and quick to undo your mistakes whether you are at home or in the classroom. This squeezable pen contains 8 ml of high-quality correction fluid that covers up any mistakes you might make. The Tipp-Ex Shake'n Squeeze is as precise as a pen and fits easily in your hand as you write, while the squeezable grip makes it easy to apply as much or as little as you need. The fine, metal point is designed for accurate application, allowing you to cover up small errors with precision. When combined with the quick-drying formula, this makes rewriting your mistakes quick and easy. The Tipp-Ex Shake'n Squeeze also has a handy tip holder and cap to protect the point and prevent leakage, while the clip makes it simple to store in a pocket or notebook until you need it.
